subtitles.english: This is my goodbye to you.
feels like it might catch a cold.
But if that's all, it'll heal quickly.

subtitles.original: サヨナラ 愛しい人

subtitles.english: Even if you call me that,
I'm never getting back with you.
I won't answer your calls anymore,
no matter how lonely I get.
but this is my goodbye to you.

subtitles.original: これでスキッとするわ
subtitles.english: This will make me feel refreshed.

subtitles.original: あの日がもったいない

subtitles.english: but this is my goodbye to you.
but this is my goodbye to you.

subtitles.original: 2曲お届けしました、Flow Glowと一緒に「Forever Love」そして「涙の色」でした！
subtitles.english: We performed two songs! That was "Forever Love" and "Namida no Iro" with Flow Glow!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ありがとうございました！
すごい、なんか私Flow Glowのメンバーになった気分だった！
subtitles.english: Amazing! I felt like I was a member of Flow Glow!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ぜひぜひメンバーに！
いや、めっちゃ嬉しいです。こんなに大人数で踊れて。
subtitles.english: I'm so happy. Getting to dance with so many of us.

subtitles.original: まずは自己紹介をみんなに…
subtitles.english: First of all, let's have everyone introduce themselves...

subtitles.original: 英語でやってもらおうかな！

subtitles.english: I'll leave the order up to you guys.

subtitles.original: おっけー、じゃあいつもの順番で！
subtitles.english: Okay, let's go in our usual order!

subtitles.original: 英語だけどバリバリね。
Hello everyone! My name is Riona! I'm Flow Glow leader, purapula! Yay! Nice to meet you!
subtitles.english: Hello everyone! My name is Riona! I'm Flow Glow's leader, purapula! Yay! Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: My name is Koganey Niko. Flow Glow's comedian modoki. Yay!
subtitles.english: My name is Koganey Niko. Flow Glow's pseudo-comedian. Yay!

subtitles.original: 英語がちょっと足りないけど、ピース！
subtitles.english: My English is a bit lacking, but peace!

subtitles.original: キアラ先輩、しゅうちゃんの日本語の「大きい」は…
クラスメイト、サンキュー！ナイトナイト！

subtitles.english: You figured it out after all.

subtitles.original: Hi! Flow Glow's DJ and driver, Mizutsu Chihaya!
subtitles.english: Hi! Flow Glow's DJ and driver, Mizutsu Chihaya!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation - My Thought Process**

Alright, let's get down to business. My task is precise, audio-synchronized subtitling. The core requirement? Meticulous timestamps (MM:SS.mmm), mirroring the vocalizations precisely from the given audio. We're dealing with "Namida no Iro" by Flow Glow – a song performance with introductions, so I must take care.

Firstly, I'm making sure I understand the vocal activation rules completely. Burnt-in subs have precedence. Then, I dive into the transcription and translation ("og" and "en" respectively), ensuring the timecodes align *perfectly* with the audio. I need to be aware of cascading delays or aggressive truncation. I will check all the members to make sure their lines are correct. I need to ensure lines don't exceed 50 characters, and no closed caption tags (like [applause] or ♪) are present. The final output has to conform to the custom tool call structure.

I have to carefully break down each segment, and make accurate timestamps. For example, at 00:00, I have to make sure the start is exactly on the first word!

The song starts; the first lines, "あぁ (Ah)" into "それでも愛してた (sore demo aishiteta) あなたとのサヨナラ (anata to no sayonara)". I will then note the instrumental section.

Next, I must identify vocal cues. At 00:24, it's clear there are specific lines: "動揺？ (douyou)", "心の隙間 (kokoro no sukima)", "風を引きそうだけど (kaze wo hikisou dakedo)", "それならすぐ治るし (sore nara sugu naorushi)", "サヨナラ愛しい人 (sayonara itoshii hito)", which are divided between Niko, Reika, and Shu.

I am paying attention to individual vocal characteristics to avoid any mistakes.

Then, there's a crucial section at 00:39 where Kiara says, "薄情？ (hakujou?)" and Niko responds. The lines, "よりを戻さないから (yori wo modosanaikara)" followed by "もう電話は出ないわ (mou denwa wa denai wa)" and "どんなに寂しくても (donna ni sabishikutemo)". I am ensuring it's all accurate and attributed.

At 00:54, Riona starts with "いつもより (itsumo yori)", "早いけど (hayai kedo)", "ベッドに入るわ (beddo ni hairu wa)", and then "懐かしい (natsukashii) 記憶との (kioku to no) 戦いの時間 (tatakai no jikan)" by Riona and Chihaya.

Next, I need to transcribe the emotional core of the song – "涙 (namida) 思い出涙 (omoide namida) 悲しくなんかないよ (kanashiku nanka nai yo) 私も強情ね (watashi mo goujou ne) 今更そう思うわ (imasara sou omou wa) あんなに愛してた (anna ni aishiteta) あなたとのサヨナラ (anata to no sayonara)". I am paying special attention here for correct attribution.

There is another instrumental section, then the repeat of the lines "涙 (namida) 止まらぬ涙 (tomaranu namida) これでスキッとするわ (kore de sukittosuru wa) あなたを信じてた (anata wo shinjiteta) あの日のもったいない (ano hi no mottainai)" This also has the chorus with high notes and variations.

Outro music, applause, and then the fun part – the after-performance banter starts. I must capture the interactions, the introductions (Kiara, Riona, Niko, Shu, Chihaya), making sure the English and Japanese match, the pronunciation, and any interesting corrections.

From the introduction, I make sure the timestamps from 03:09 onward are meticulous. Then the introductions: Riona's leader introduction in English. Niko's comedian modoki introduction with the peace sign. Shu's big car, big zoom moment with some fun confusion between "big" and "small". Chihaya's DJ introduction.

Finally, I will render this to the tool in the correct format. It should be a JSON array, ready for integration. I'll invoke final_result once complete.
